title: alisma submersum var. graminifolium
intro: Alisma submersum var. graminifolium, also known as the lesser water-plantain or Chinese water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Alismataceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing edema, alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, Alisma submersum var. graminifolium is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is commonly combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
